bio.Recent_Position: Technical Recruiting Coordinator Intern at TikTok in Mountain View, CA
bio.Bios: Hi hi! I'm Grace and I initiated into this super cool brotherhood in fall quarter of my 1st year here at UCI. When I do have free time, you can catch me baking pastries, finding new music on soundcloud, or adventuring in search of new foods and views. A fun fact about me is that my highschool a capella group sang the National Anthem at a Warriors game! Ask me about my lil puppy or the places I've traveled to at recruitment :))
